title: Undespawnable Named Items Datapack
description: Item entities don't despawn if they're named.
body:
![display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7bd700af7092b8b9228e6765d2075147fc574bb.png)
This datapack allows Item Entities to not despawn in the world if the item is named.

 

 Special thanks to Xisumavoid for providing the idea for this datapack!

 

(Note: if you are using plugins that delete entities such as ClearLag this datapack may not work as intended.)
